law_64_status_update: Per cycle 4 prospective corpus + Stouffer's z combined verdict: Law 64 'CA(5) beats Transformer 81%' is statistically REJECTED at z=-14.68 (overwhelming evidence against). Implication: claim either (a) was based on different corpus that does NOT generalize to cycle 4 prospective 8-task, OR (b) was folklore without measured basis. Cycle 4 corpus DOES support narrower claim 'CA(5) ground-truth ties Markov on uniform-density CA tasks; both achieve 100% on majority CA-amenable test sets'.
